entry.title: Dream11 রেফারেল কোড কী? ILGSDB2LM (বোনাস পান)
entry.content:
Dream11 রেফারেল কোড ILGSDB2LM। এই রেফারেল কোড ব্যবহার করে যখন আপনি নতুন অ্যাকাউন্ট তৈরি করবেন, তখন আপনি ₹250 সঙ্গে সঙ্গে Dream11 অ্যাকাউন্টে পাবেন। পরবর্তীতে, আপনি এই কোড ব্যবহার করে Dream11-এ গেম খেলতে পারবেন। সবচেয়ে ভালো বিষয় হলো, আপনি শুরুতেই নিজের টাকা না ঢালেও এখানে খেলে আয় করতে পারবেন।

Dream11 রেফারেল কোড কী?

আপনার Dream11 রেফারেল কোড ILGSDB2LM। আপনাকে নতুন অ্যাকাউন্ট তৈরির সময় এই কোডটি ব্যবহার করতে হবে। আপনি যদি জানতে চান যে Dream11 Refer & Earn প্রোগ্রাম থেকে নতুন ব্যবহারকারীরা কীভাবে উপকৃত হতে পারে, তবে চিন্তা করবেন না! এই রেফারেল কোড শুধুমাত্র নতুন ব্যবহারকারীদের জন্য কার্যকর। এটি ব্যবহার করলে আপনি ₹250 এর তাৎক্ষণিক বোনাস পাবেন।

Dream11 রেফারেল কোড ২০২৫

অ্যাপের নাম
Dream11

Dream11 রেফারেল কোড
ILGSDB2LM

রেফারেল বোনাস
₹250

Dream11 ইনভাইট কোড
ILGSDB2LM

Dream11 সম্পর্কে

Dream11 একটি ফ্যান্টাসি স্পোর্টস অ্যাপ, যেখানে আপনি ক্রিকেট, ফুটবল, বাস্কেটবল এবং অন্যান্য খেলাগুলোর জন্য নিজের দল তৈরি করতে পারেন।

আপনাকে খেলোয়াড়দের নির্বাচন করতে হবে তাদের পূর্ববর্তী পারফরম্যান্সের উপর ভিত্তি করে। আপনি উভয় দলের খেলোয়াড়দের বেছে নিতে পারেন। ধরুন, আপনি যদি ক্রিকেট ম্যাচের জন্য দল তৈরি করেন, তাহলে আপনি ব্যাটসম্যান, বোলার, অলরাউন্ডার এবং উইকেটকিপার উভয় দলের থেকে নির্বাচন করতে পারবেন।

entry.title: Re: Why the second ZP document is being created with full...
entry.content: In S4 PC, when we have executed the automatic payment run there are two ZP docs created. ZP1 is debited vendor payable account($100) and credited bank outgoing clearing account ($100). Also another ZP2 created by debit ($100) and credit ($100) to the same bank outgoing clearing account (the job log says that this is for bank charges, however both debt and credit with full invoice value as of ZP1 doc). Then, the credit of ZP1 ($100) is cleared against the debit ($100) of ZP2. Now, there is still a open line item of ZP2 credit line ($100). Now, should we clear this credit of ZP2 against the bank statement that we receive from Bank with the actual amount paid to vendor? If the bank pays $100 to vendor and charges $5 as bank charges. Then the bank statement upload would take care of the clearing and post $5 as bank charges? Pls advise, thanks for your help

entry.title: Re: Customer COE: SAP EarlyWatch Alert transitions from SAP Solution Manager to SAP for Me
entry.content:
Hi Susanne,

I was wondering if, with the end of SAP Solution Manager, the way to send data to SAP for generating the SAP EarlyWatch report, as you mentioned, would be through SAP Cloud Application Lifecycle Management (CALM).

I’m still unclear on how our non-VAR customers will be able to obtain the report once SolMan is no longer available. Could you clarify this please?

entry.title: Dream11 பரிந்துரை குறியீடு என்ன? ILGSDB2LM (போனஸ் பெறுங்கள்)
entry.content:
Dream11 பரிந்துரை குறியீடு ILGSDB2LM. இந்த குறியீட்டை பயன்படுத்தி நீங்கள் புதிய கணக்கை உருவாக்கும்போது, உங்கள் Dream11 கணக்கில் ₹250 உடனடியாக கிடைக்கும். பின்னர், இந்த குறியீட்டை பயன்படுத்தி Dream11-ல் விளையாடலாம். சிறந்த விஷயம் என்னவென்றால், நீங்கள் ஆரம்பத்தில் எந்த பணத்தையும் சேர்க்காமல் விளையாடி பணம் சம்பாதிக்கலாம்.

Dream11 பரிந்துரை குறியீடு என்றால் என்ன?

உங்கள் Dream11 பரிந்துரை குறியீடு ILGSDB2LM. புதிய கணக்கை உருவாக்கும் போது இந்த குறியீட்டை பயன்படுத்த வேண்டும். நீங்கள் Dream11 Refer & Earn திட்டம் மூலம் புதிய பயனர்கள் எப்படி பயனடையலாம் என்று அறிய விரும்பினால் கவலைப்பட தேவையில்லை! இந்த குறியீடு புதிய பயனர்களுக்கு மட்டும் பொருந்தும், இதன் மூலம் நீங்கள் ₹250 உடனடி போனஸ் பெறுவீர்கள்.

Dream11 பரிந்துரை குறியீடு 2025

ஆப் பெயர்
Dream11

Dream11 பரிந்துரை குறியீடு
ILGSDB2LM

பரிந்துரை போனஸ்
₹250

Dream11 அழைப்பு குறியீடு
ILGSDB2LM

Dream11 பற்றிய தகவல்

Dream11 ஒரு கற்பனை விளையாட்டு (Fantasy Sports) செயலி, இதில் நீங்கள் கிரிக்கெட், கால்பந்து, கூடைப்பந்து மற்றும் பிற விளையாட்டுகளுக்கான உங்கள் சொந்த அணியை உருவாக்கலாம்.

நீங்கள் முந்தைய போட்டிகளில் நடித்த வீரர்களின் செயல்திறனை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்டு அவர்களை தேர்ந்தெடுக்க வேண்டும். இரண்டு அணிகளிலிருந்தும் வீரர்களை தேர்வு செய்யலாம். உதாரணமாக, நீங்கள் கிரிக்கெட் அணியை உருவாக்கும்போது, நீங்கள் இரண்டு அணிகளிலிருந்தும் பேட்ஸ்மேன், பௌலர், ஆல்-ரவுண்டர் மற்றும் விக்கெட் கீப்பரை தேர்வு செய்யலாம்.

entry.title: Re: How Can I buy SAP SQL Anywhere 17 License
entry.content: I notice today that clicking any "pricing and packaging option" shows me the same price in the CleverBridge e-commerce page.  It seems there is a problem.  Has anyone purchased SQL Anywhere from the SAP online store recently?  I tried to create a new Post for this comment, but I'm asked for a "Bulletin Board"??? Alas, surprises and worries continue.

entry.title: Dream11 રેફરલ કોડ શું છે? ILGSDB2LM (બોનસ મેળવો)
entry.content:
Dream11 રેફરલ કોડ ILGSDB2LM છે. આ રેફરલ કોડનો ઉપયોગ કરીને જ્યારે તમે નવું એકાઉન્ટ બનાવશો, ત્યારે તમને ₹250 તરત જ Dream11 એકાઉન્ટમાં મળી જશે. ત્યારબાદ, તમે આ કોડનો ઉપયોગ કરીને Dream11 પર રમવાનું શરૂ કરી શકો છો. સૌથી સારી વાત એ છે કે તમે શરૂઆતમાં તમારું કોઈપણ પોતાનું પૈસું ઉમેર્યા વગર અહીં રમી અને કમાઈ શકો છો.

Dream11 રેફરલ કોડ શું છે?

તમારું Dream11 રેફરલ કોડ ILGSDB2LM છે. તમારે નવું એકાઉન્ટ બનાવતી વખતે આ કોડનો ઉપયોગ કરવો પડશે. જો તમે જાણવા માંગો છો કે Dream11 Refer & Earn પ્રોગ્રામ નવા યુઝર્સ માટે કેવી રીતે ફાયદાકારક છે, તો ચિંતા કરવાની જરૂર નથી! આ રેફરલ કોડ ફક્ત નવા યુઝર્સ માટે છે, જેનો ઉપયોગ કરીને તમારે ₹250 નો તાત્કાલિક બોનસ મળશે.

Dream11 રેફરલ કોડ 2025

એપનું નામ
Dream11

Dream11 રેફરલ કોડ
ILGSDB2LM

રેફરલ બોનસ
₹250

Dream11 આમંત્રણ કોડ
ILGSDB2LM

Dream11 વિશે

Dream11 એ એક ફેન્ટેસી સ્પોર્ટ્સ એપ છે, જ્યાં તમે ક્રિકેટ, ફૂટબોલ, બાસ્કેટબોલ અને અન્ય રમતો માટે તમારું પોતાનું ટીમ બનાવી શકો છો.

તમારે પાછળના મેચોના પ્રદર્શનના આધારે ખેલાડીઓ પસંદ કરવા પડશે. તમે બન્ને ટીમમાંથી ખેલાડીઓ પસંદ કરી શકો છો. ઉદાહરણ તરીકે, જો તમે ક્રિકેટ મેચ માટે ટીમ બનાવી રહ્યા છો, તો તમે બેટ્સમેન, બોલર, ઓલરાઉન્ડર અને વિકેટકીપર બન્ને ટીમમાંથી પસંદ કરી શકો છો.

entry.title: SAP Community Escape House for April – SAP Build 👷‍♀️🏠
entry.content:
The SAP Community Escape House has a new addition!!

We've built a garage for our workshop to build all kinds of stuff using SAP Build. Use your wits and knowledge about SAP Build – specifically SAP Build Process Automation – to try to escape.

WARNING: It will be really tough to escape – you have been warned! So I will be providing tips throughout the month to help you through, so subscribe to this post.

For this year, all SAP Developer Challenges created by the Developer Advocates will happen in the SAP Community Escape House (shout out to @nicoschoenteich for his amazing creativity). Each month we will unlock a new room in the house with a specific focus. Completing a challenge means successfully escaping the room by solving a series of coding – or no-code 😉 – tasks/questions. This month is all about one of the tools inside SAP Build.

Here are our previous challenges:

  • January: UI5
  • February: Integration Suite
  • March: AI

Visit the SAP Community Escape House and enter your numeric SAP Community user ID.

If you don't know your user ID, click Need Help? This will display a link to your community settings page.

Then you will see your ID here:

Once you see the SAP Community Escape House, select the SAP Build garage.

The user interface of an escape room includes the room itself as well as a terminal. You can click the objects in the room to receive tips.

Like in a real (physical) escape room, you will have to try out a few things and explore the room until you receive helpful tips and, eventually, instructions. These tips and instructions are printed in the terminal next to the room.

The terminal is also used to submit solutions to tasks. Read the instructions you receive carefully to understand how.

If you successfully escape the room (you will know when that happens), you will receive a badge in the SAP Community – and the unending esteem of your fellow SAP developers, business users and implementers. We will assign the badges once the challenge closes.

Good luck!

😺

entry.title: Create a valuation grouping
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I´m in need of creating a new valuation grouping for automatic account determiantion in a different comany code, which SSCUI do i have to configure to do this? and also if needed, what other configuration activities do I need to perform?

Thank you in advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Re: In BAS, ui5-deploy.yaml files in all applications have an "Unable to load schema ..."

entry.content: Bumping

entry.title: Re: Create CDS Value Help or F4 help for In App Field Custom Fields

It works all fine.

Just to make it very clear "release the view" means creating a Contract C1 🙂
Just in case somebody is wondering.

entry.title: Re: Using CNMASS to change the system and user statuses
entry.content: The question was posted in 2013 so 3 years before this transaction was created 😏

entry.title: Re: Getting error while posting cash receipt for revenue...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

The issue you are encountering is due to a missing entry in the default account assignment configuration step for  the G/L account mentioned in your screenshots.

This is a functional problem and this modification had to be brought using the OKB9 transaction as shown below :

The functional consultant needs to fill the Cost Ctr fiel with an existing cost center value to get through your error message.

I hope this will help you solve your problem.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba User Provisioning Using SAP Identity Provisioning Service (IPS)
entry.content: Hello Imran! Thanks for this useful article, I'm able to test in an internal environment, super helpful! Bonus question - in my case, users in CIS don't all have a Display Name (or userName?) - which in the standard schema is not sending a UniqueName of user to Ariba either. What is a schema/mapping transformation, that would be able to concatenate First Name and Last Name and send it in target displayName?

entry.title: Re: Translation of costing sheet entry
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Could you be a little bit more specific and mention which application you are using or providing a screenshot with all the detailed steps ?

Thank you in advance for your answer.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple Sold To parties
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Settlement Management- Condition Contracts.

We have a scenario where we have one Bill- To assigned to Multiple Sold-To Parties. During settlement in Condition contracts, from Bill To party the correct Sold to Party has to be determined from business volume and price of that sold to has to be determined in the Settlement Document from condition records to settle to the customer.

i'm talking of multi-Payee 0S02 condition contract for rebate and i'm maintaining condition records with Sold to Parties in the condition contract, the sold to parties are maintained in Business volume criteria. System is creating Settlement documents with same bill to party but all the settlement documents considering only one condition record of one sold to party instead of considering condition record of each sold to party maintained in the condition records of CCM. (Scenario- One bill party assigned to Multiple Sold To Parties)

Can you please suggest ways to determine each sold to party from the same bill to party so that condition records of each sold to party is determined.

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Re: Service Layer API filter - operator 'like' does not w...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can use the SQLQueries entity, you have more possibilites to work with queries.

Here is a sample:

You send a POST to the endpoint b1s/v1/SQLQueries

The payload:

{
"SqlCode": "Demo_Q1",
"SqlName": "Demo - list of Salesorder",
"SqlText": "SELECT T0.[DocNum],T0.[DocDate], T0.[DocDueDate], T0.[CreateDate] FROM ORDR T0 WHERE T0.[CardName] like '002%' order by T0.[Createdate] desc"
}

It will create the query with ID "Demo_Q1. You can then list the result by sending a POST to the endpoint  b1s/v1/SQLQueries('Demo_Q1')/List

 

Best regards

entry.title: EC Payroll Archiving
entry.content: Customer is looking for understanding on suggested best practices for archiving payroll data.  How to make sure EC Payroll stays in sync with EC when records are archived and basic set up and understanding of where archived data should sit for EC Payroll.  Do we have documentation to share with a customer about these things?

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy  We are on SAP Business Technology Platform, Neo environment as of now. Can Joule be set up in this neo environment or do we need to migrate to Cloud Foundry to use Joule?

 

Thank you,

sanjay

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content:
Hi @kirankumardara,

In standard scenario of Multiple customers (0S02), every Sold-to of the billing document become a Bill-to in the settlement document. 
In your case, if I understand correctly, you want to provide a rebate to the relevant Bill-to party (and not sold-to) which is related to several Sold-to. 

For that you will have to: 

  1. Use split criteria to transfer each Bill-to party of the billing document to Bill-to party of the settlement document. 
  2. Use split criteria to transfer each Sold-to to a field at line item of the settlement document (to regroup all Sold-to into 1 document for the same Bill-to). You can use the field CUSTOMER and CUSTOMER_CDS if not used. 
  3. Use a condition table to maintain the condition record per Sold-to
  4. Use Transfer manager to transfer the value of field CUSTOMER to Sold-to for pricing determination (KOMK)

This is specific to your scenario and can vary based on the requirement of each project. Other way to do it is also available but the above is the most straightforward and leveraging standard configuration. 

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
@Sanjayt ,

99.9% of SAP BTP Global Accounts are already upgraded to the MultiCloud which supports Cloud Foundry. If not, it's a <24-hour job in which SAP can help you with the upgrade. Please check with your CSP for more details and you should be able to Joule for sure. 

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: Re: Service Layer API filter - operator 'like' does not w...
entry.content:
Hello William,

thank you for your Answer, i know that possibility.

But i need the functionality within CAP-Sql

eg. cds-repl-Command: (Standard for Odata).

qx = B1Svl.run(SELECT.columns('CardCode', 'DocNum').from('B1Svl.Orders').where `CardName like '001%' `

and here i get the error...

So my opinion is, that is a bug and should be fixed.

Kind Regards,
Matthias

entry.title: Re: Problem with the transaction F150
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question on the SAP Community’s blog.

To answer your question, yes you can print dunning letters in Arabic even if the customer's language is set to English in their master data. Here are the solutions you can consider in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition:

Solution 1: Assign an Arabic Language Form for Dunning Output

Even though the customer language is set to English, you can configure the dunning output to use an Arabic form.

 Steps to configure:

1️. Go to « Output Parameter Determination » application

Select the « Dunning » value  in the Show Rules for field

 

2️. Pick the « Form Template » value in the Determination Step field

Define a new condition where:

The Language is Arabic (AR) :

Assign an Arabic version of the dunning letter form.

If an Arabic form does not exist, you need to create one using Adobe LiveCycle Designer.

 

Solution 2: Use Translation in Form Templates

If you are using Adobe Forms for dunning letters, you can configure the form to support multiple languages, including Arabic.

How to do it:

1️. Go to « Maintain Form Templates » application

 

2️.  Check the existing form template for dunning letters

Example: FIN_FO_DUNNING_NOTICE

 

3️. Download the form and edit it using Adobe LiveCycle Designer

Add Arabic translations for all static texts.

Ensure the text direction is right-to-left (RTL) for Arabic.

Use the correct Arabic font (e.g., Arial Unicode MS, Noto Naskh Arabic).

 

4️. Upload the modified form back to SAP

 

5️. Assign this Arabic version in « Output Parameter Determination » application

 

Solution 3: Manually Override the Output Language

If the previous solutions don’t work, you can manually override the output language for dunning notices:

When running F150 (Dunning Run), check the Print Parameters.

Change the output language to Arabic before printing.

 

I hope it will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Accept deviation does not work sap customer checkout...
entry.content:
Hi Klaus,

Thanks for your reply.

My scenario's version is V4.0.55, according to SAP note are the latest released. Actually, in my environment, which is Cloud Control Center I have different scenario versions, but the behavior is the same.

Thanks for your help.

 

Kind regards

Jhon Sebastián.

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content:
Hi @kirankumardara, 

I've just answered your previous post on the exact same topic:
https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-q-a/determine-partner-from-one-bill-to-party-to-multiple-sold-to-parties/qaq-p/14062706/comment-id/203772#M203772

Please don't duplicate post in SAP Community but wait for an answer or reach out to the SAP contact following the account of your company. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: How does Transports move in SAC having N, N+1 Landscape with multiple releases(R1,R2 etc)
entry.content:
Consider we have a development tenant and a production tenant only provisioned due to a client's cost constraints for SAC in BTP, How will the transports be moved/tested from the development tenant to production tenant considering the fact that there could be multiple releases and there needs to be a differentiation between transports of Production Support Landscape and Maintenance(Project) Landscape.

 

Thanks,

Pavan.

entry.title: User in BKPF-USNAM that does not exist
entry.content:
Hi, 

We found, on a audit client, some journal entries that are integrated from another system with reference to a user that doesn't exists on both systems, via IDOC. I tested and it's possible too via bapi. 

The question here is if it's stored anywhere the information about the real user that made the entry?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Out Bound delivery from reservations
entry.content: Hi, could you mention how we can create outbound Delivery in EWM for the reservations created against the work order.

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Checkout Monitor to prompt for a user ID...
entry.content:
Hi Vasan,

Try to restart SAP integration Framework Service. It should work to ask for user and pass again in SCCO Monitor.

BR.

Jhon Sebastián.

entry.title: Re: Insert Link feature stopped working in SEN

BR

Iuri

entry.title: Re: sap fiori elemets application for the list report page

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for April – SAP Build 👷‍♀️🏠

entry.title: Re: A First Look at SAP HANA Cloud, AI-Assisted Database Administration
entry.content:
Hi @Victor_Cervantes,

This message appears when the BTP user you're logged in as does not have the role collection "SAP HANA Cloud Administrator".  A BTP user with that role collection will be able to toggle (enable) the button, whereas a user without that role collection cannot switch it.

Best regards,
José

nice blog, very usefull.

In case of CC it has to be triggered manually? How can we set it up to trigger automatically based on active WM settings?

 

BR

entry.title: Is there a solution to prevent personal email on from being visible in Spotlight?
entry.content: In Spotlight, we only would want a team member who is assigned a business email and set as primary visible. All team members enter personal email at ONB and it may it is set to primary but not all team members receive a usable business email address later. We do not wish for the personal email address to be visible to other team members. How can we prevent this in the Spotlight feature?

entry.title: Bath successfully generated for some payments in BNK_MONI however, some payments got struck in BNK_M
entry.content: Payment Run is successfully created, but after running the batch in FBPM1 the batch is not created checked all the variants for other payment method with same details it is creating the batch, Batch successfully generated for some payments in BNK_MONI however, some payments got struck in BNK_MONIP. Can anyone help me on this.

entry.title: Payment not in batch
entry.content: Bath successfully generated for some payments in BNK_MONI however, some payments got struck in BNK_MONIP and showing as " Payments not in Batch"...help me to fix this error. it is showing payment not in batch.

entry.title: Clear Open PMR from "Stage for Production" app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few component quantity which are no longer required to be consumed against an order but in "Stage for Production" app these components are still showing as these needs to be staged because the PMR is exisitng. Can we get rid of these PMR"s which are no longer required to stage

example: For an order "O1", we need 100 EA of component "A". But we have completed the order by just staging and consuming 98 EA"s of "A". Now the order O1 is finally confirmed but in stage for produciton app, we still see 2 EA needs to be staged which is creating a confusion to the operators. 

Can we clear the record for 2 EA from "Stage for Production" app ?

I know that it will be cleared if we change the quantity of component "A" in "O1" to 98 but this is not so feasible as we need to change for each order and we do TECO at the end of the month. We use cross- order staging. 

 

Thanks

Vamsi Krishna

entry.title: what is the default role and grouping considered during customer creation in BP?
entry.content:
Hi,

When I tried to create customer in BP, I received an error message "Grouping BP02 has external number assignment, enter a number".

1. My system has various groupings defined, but out of them all why is it looking for BP02? is there any settings behind it? As a user do I have any roles assigned to me?

2. Also, do we have any settings to link Customer group(KDGRP) to Customer Account group(KTOKD)?

Thanks for you prompt replies

entry.title: Assign the user roles as mentioned in the help documentation and log in again to access the page.
entry.content:
Hi, In my BTP Cockpit trial account for Integratui Suite, I have added Integration_Provisioner under Role Collections under Default Identity Services. But still I am unable to add capabilities

Also, I am unable to Delete the Service Key. Is this the issue? Please guide me.

 

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: CI-DS webservice dataflow created from an xml map and aggregation transform
entry.content:
Hello Gurus 

I hope you can help me and any comments will be greatly appreciated

We send forecast data from IBP to S4 to be used for AATP. The existing dataflow has been working flawlessly and its a relatively simple one

The S4 team has requested a change where they would like to capture the number of records sent, the date and the time. They would like to have it recorded at their end alongside with the forecast records. Basically they would have a table with individual forecast records (aprox 100K) and another one with only 3 values (count records, date, and time)

In CI-DS, the Webservice Functions looks like this (existing vs new)

 

I have not managed to make it completely work. At some point we only got the first 10,000 records (Batch Size 10,000) and the 3 values of the EXEC_INFO

I created something like this 

Where in 1 I'm doing the mapping of the individual records (forecast) and in 2 I'm doing the aggregation in order to obtain the count and the date and time are simple mapped to sysdate() and systime().

The problem comes at the end for the mapping with the Target_Web_Service_Call transform because I cannot select both transform (drag and drop from top to top)

If I have to use only one transform to map the Target_Web_Service_Call how do I deal with the fact that I need individual records (forecast) and aggregated values (counter)? And also the fact that because the number of records is +100K I need a Batch transformer as well.

Thanks in advance for taking the time to have a look and make suggestions

Best regards

Roberto

entry.title: Translation Solution
entry.content: Is there a Translation solution that allows you to translate a document and or cut and paste content that is not created in Enable Now like from a word document and translate it into an available language?  If so can you point me to where I can learn more and use this service.

entry.title: Purchasing organization for direct and indirect procurement processes.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question regarding Purchasing organization, In which cases we should have one harmonized purchasing organization and in which cases we should go for 2 different purchasing organizations 1 for direct and 1 for indirect procurement? our processes are 75% similar for direct & indirect procurement. 

Can anybody provide a checklist or criteria ?

Awaiting your reply impatiently. Thank you...

PS - Please review error message in attached screenshot.

entry.title: Re: PLD - print several documents at once

entry.title: RAP List Report aggregation missing only in deployed version
entry.content:
I've created an RAP APP ( on adt side ) to show an list report fiori app with option to navigate for detail ( also a list report ).

I neeed to have totals and subtotals so I put the anotaion @Aggregation.default: #SUM in the projection view.
When I preview the APP using Service bindiing preview option I've the totals:

When I go to details ( using associations ) I also have de totals:

After I deploy the APP using BAS I lost totals in the main view:

So I assumed that some limitation in BAS side. But if I go to the details ( in the deployed app ), I have the totals:

Since I have parameters, I'm using oDataV2 protocol.

Can you please help me identigying what could be the problem? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Plan Delivery Time for Purchase requisition i...

Hi Caetano,

MD_MODIFY_SOURCE is not getting triggered at MD01N, i have used MD_MRP_PARAMETERS and it satisfies my requirement in MD01. Do we have any BADI which works similar MD_MRP_PARAMETERS in MD01N. I have checked your blog for new BADI PPH_SUPPLY_DEMAND_LIST introduced after 2022 but i am working on 1909. 

Br,

entry.title: Sap Support when MFA authentication is active
entry.content:
Hello expert.

In the Tinexta environment, to connect to the Datasphere environment, an MFA authentication process has been put in place. I was wondering, in such circumstances, which are the Sap best practices to enable the user devoted to you (the Sap Support User) to connect to the Datasphere environment. Now, to enable to your team to connect, we have temporally disabled the MFA authentication process, but I suppose that this cannot be a stable solution, even considering that in the future we will need your assistance for the Production environment, where we will not be authorized to disable the MFA authentication process. I hope you got my point.

Waiting for your reply

Regards

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Plan Delivery Time for Purchase requisition i...
entry.content:
Hello

Hello 

The following note provides a list of the Classic MRP ABAP BAdIs and the equivalent AMDP BAdIs that are called in MRP Live:

2268085 - S4TWL - MRP Live on SAP HANA - MD01N

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: SAP Developer News April 3rd, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION 

Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/04/03/sap-developer-news-april-3rd-2025/ 

Developer Challenge 

  • Blog: TK 
  • SAP Community Escape House: https://sap-community-escape-house.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/house 

 Generative AI in SAP Build Process Automation  

  • Blog : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-brings-generative-ai-to-process-automation-to-enable-your/ba-p/14049869  
  • SAP Help Portal : https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/generate-process?locale=en-US  

 Generative AI in SAP Build Apps 

  • Blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/create-sap-build-apps-applications-in-minutes-with-ai/ba-p/14054862 
  • SAP Help portal https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/generate-pages-using-ai 

 SAP BTP Usability Event – HANA Cloud 

  • Registration form: https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=bGf3QlX0PEKC9twtmXka9zoyeoeObGdNh1zA5HmpzP5UMEVIN0xWUlBRWUlCWUlQUVJKV1pZMDFBWS4u  

  

CHAPTER TITLES  

0:00 Intro 

0:10 Developer Challenge 

1:12 Generative AI in SAP Build Process Automation 

2:08 Generative AI in SAP Build Apps 

3:08 SAP BTP Usability Event – HANA Cloud 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for April 3rd, 2025.

[Daniel] You might have heard the sound of heavy machinery working on an addition to the SAP community escape house. Well, I'm happy to say that the SAP build garage is now ready. April's Developer Challenge will deal with a specific and key feature of SAP build. Well, I can tell you that. You have to discover that for yourself. It will include spy gear, exercise equipment, something from last month's AI challenge, and a few things that you won't see when you first enter the room. It will be a real challenge, no doubt about it. But if you're able to get out of the garage alive, please add a comment to my blog post and tell me how it went. Good luck.

[Rekha DR] Hello everybody! Are you a developer using SAP Build tools to build applications and automations? Then here is a good news for you to amplify productivity and efficiency in your day-to-day work. You can now use Generative AI in SAP Build Process Automation. You can enable Generative AI for your BTP tenant within the control tower of SAP. and then you can use Generative AI to generate a business process, a data type or a form from the overview screen of the project. Within the process, you can create an automation task, explain the business process in natural language. Generate new code in the script task, explain a decision or generate business rules. For more details, check this blog post by product expert, Yogananda Muthaiah provided in the description box. Keep learning, keep exploring. Thank you.  

[Shrinivasan] SAP applications are continuing to evolve with generative AI capabilities, and these capabilities are now available in SAP Build Apps. There is a new AI powered feature available in our no-code development environment now. SAP Build Apps now includes a generative AI feature that makes it easier to create pages for create, read, update operations on you. your existing OData backup. Simply enable an identity from the Integrations tab, and you will see the new Generate Pages option. Keep in mind, you will need to enable the Generative AI feature from the Control Tower first to use this option. Once generated, these pages can be customized and extended further to suit your specific needs. Note that the generated Pages feature comes with a usage limit of 100 requests per month for each user. Explore this new functionality to to jumpstart your application development. The links to the blog post and the help portal on this new feature is available in the description.

[Antonio] Holla, SAP Database Administrators and Database Developers. Have you ever wanted to provide feedback on the SAP HANA Cloud database service? Well, now you can. There will be an SAP BTP usability event on the 13th and 14th of May in Walldorf Germany. This is an in-person event where you can gain insights on the SAP's product vision. Also, you can share ideas directly with the development teams and provide your input on new features directly to the engineering teams. If you're interested in participating, make sure to register on the link that I'm going to share in the description of this video. Thank you very much for your time.Ciao

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM cTMS configuration and SAP Solman integration to move SuccessFactor change in ChaRM
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

I am looking SAP Cloud ALM cTMS configuration and SAP Solman integration to move SuccessFactor change in ChaRM . i refered the https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/integration-of-ctms-as-part-of-sap-cloud-alm-and-charm/ba-p/13651994 and https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/integrate-ci-cd-with-ctms-as-part-of-sap-cloud-alm/ba-p/13653010

But i am not able to find the SAP help or blog for below details as mentioned in th below, 

  • Setting up connectivity between CTMS and SAP BTP tenants.
  • Defining CTMS nodes as external services in LMDB on SAP Solution Manager, including the attributes in LMDB that outline the connectivity.
  • How to connect SF tenant in BTP and configure the transport management, then connect to cTMS and connect to SAP Solution Manager to start using ChaRM – Normal change for SF change movement.

Hope you're fine.

Erick Goulardt
SAP Support

entry.title: How to transfer the material EWM storage bin to Kitting location(Production location)
entry.content:
Hi,

The procured raw material is stored in the warehouse using storage bins. I have created a production order, and the system automatically generates a reservation against the production order. In this case, only the material can be issued to the production order using movement type 261. However, my requirement is to initially transfer the material to the kitting area against the production order before issuing it to the production order.

Please let me know how to handle this scenario.

entry.title: Re: Where is the End User Job Aid located?
entry.content: There are no job aids listed in the document provided. They used to be included where do we go to find the end user and admin job aids?

entry.title: LMS HRBP/Manager Team List
entry.content:
Question: Is there a display limitation of how many employees can be seen when expanding the lists in the My Team view? We did a test and while expanding the nodes did not allow us to see all the employees, we were able to access them via the available search bar.

Thank you.

entry.title: 2 vs 4 Physical CPUs
entry.content:
We have been running SQL Anywhere on Windows servers with 2 CPUs for years. We are upgrading to new hardware and have decided to go to our maximum licensing allowance of 4 CPUs. We just did some testing and see no difference in SQL Query/Update/Edit completion from the old hardware.

What am I missing?

entry.content: i made changes to custom access sequences. however, i can not see those access sequences under the "Add Item" option. Any idea what's wrong?

entry.title: Re: Availability Groups in SAP EWM: Ensuring Accurate Stock Allocation
entry.content: Nice detailed blog Rahul!

entry.title: FM or BAPI to create Collective Production order
entry.content:
Hi All,
    I want to link a production order to a existing collective production order . Is there any FM or BAPI available which i use to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Re: using selection screen tabbed block how to bind SALV,...
entry.content:
Delete following code

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 100 AS SUBSCREEN.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 100.

Create the subscreen 100 with screen painter. First only add a textfield. If this works add a custom control to the subscreen 100. Fill the custom control with your alv in process before output of screen 100.

entry.title: SAP Screen Personas and Adapt UI simplify classic apps. April 2025 roadmap update
entry.content:
Customer adoption of SAP Screen Personas and Adapt UI for classic apps within SAP S/4HANA Cloud continues to grow. The most popular scenarios in which people simplify the classic screens in public cloud environments are sales orders and purchase orders. In this post, I’ll discuss when to use SAP Screen Personas and SAP Fiori apps, the SAP Screen Personas roadmap, and some specific next steps for customers and partners to optimize your UX transformation journey.

SAP Screen Personas is one way to deliver the SAP Fiori user experience

In a recent call with a partner supporting a large retailer, they asked if their customer should use SAP Screen Personas to simplify the classic sales order apps or to use the latest SAP Fiori app for Manage Sales Orders. Generally, if there is an SAP Fiori app that SAP ships, we recommend you evaluate it. SAP Fiori apps based on SAP Fiori elements receive ongoing innovations, including embedded AI capabilities that continue to evolve.

Most organizations will use a combination of SAP-delivered Fiori apps, adapted SAP Fiori apps, SAP Screen Personas flavors for classic applications, and SAP Fiori elements apps that they build themselves to provide a complete and consistent UX to their users. So, you should probably use a combination of both SAP Screen Personas AND SAP Fiori.

SAP Screen Personas is one of several steps that SAP has taken over the past decade to make its ERP screen easier to use:

  • Creating 1000s of SAP Fiori apps to cover the most common business scenarios
  • Making SAP Screen Personas available to help customers simplify other transactions
  • Acquiring WalkMe to allow customers to annotate workflows in enterprise applications

Continuous improvement is part of the SAP UX Engineering culture

Within SAP Screen Personas, we are continuing to innovate to make it easier for you to streamline business processes that still rely on classic apps. In addition to all the basic screen editing functions that have been available for over a decade, we are making scripting more powerful and providing more capabilities to manage the tables that are so common in classic apps. With all the innovations in the SAP Fiori design system, we have also added more granular controls so you can give the classic screens the SAP Fiori user experience to improve usability and ensure consistency across the entire SAP portfolio.

SAP Screen Personas flavors can launch from My Home, alongside SAP Fiori apps, again providing a consistent way to access core ERP functionality. In short, the SAP Screen Personas roadmap focuses on continuing to innovate with new features and integrate into the rest of the portfolio so you can enjoy better usability and more UX consistency in your SAP ERP systems.

VA01, VA02, VA03, ME21N, ME22N, ME23N remain among the most common transactions

SAP Screen Personas is a key part of SAP’s user experience strategy

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – the ability to simplify classic screens is built into the Adapt UI menu. If you open it for an SAP Fiori app, you can edit the screen with SAPUI5 Flexibility. If you open Adapt UI in a classic app, you will launch the SAP Screen Personas screen editor.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition – the add-on is available for download.
  • SAP S/4HANA (on-prem) and ECC – the process is the same as for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, since you control your IT environment.

Since we added it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as a standard feature, that should be solid evidence that the ability to adapt the UI of classic apps is something important to us. We are supporting SAP Screen Personas functionality through at least 2040.

SAP Screen Persons flavors are part of a clean core strategy, as they do not touch the core transactions / classic apps.

How to improve the user experience of your SAP ERP system

Customers

  • If you run SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP Fiori apps should be your go-to solution, whenever possible. The SAP Fiori app reference library has a list of all the apps that are available in your environment.
  • For classic applications that don’t have an SAP Fiori app, you can use the power of SAP Screen Personas to hide fields you don’t need, pre-fill content if the information does not change, or automate repetitive actions using the scripting engine.
  • SAP Screen Personas is built into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as part of the Adapt UI capabilities. For SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and on-prem, you can install the add-on in less than an hour, if you know what you are doing. There is no additional license fee to use SAP Screen Personas in any environment.

Partners

SAP Screen Personas should be one of several key tools that are part of your UX transformation tool kit. If you don’t have expertise today, you can start with the free training course on SAP Screen Personas on the SAP Learning platform.

Learn more about SAP Screen Personas

  • Online training. The best way to learn the basics about SAP Screen Personas (Adapt UI for classic applications) is to take our course on the SAP Learning platform. https://learning.sap.com/courses/adapting-the-ui-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-using-sap-screen-personas
  • Connect with your peers. Every other month, we have a group of customers that gather online to share best practices, demo their flavors, and answer each other’s questions. Experts from the product team also join to explain how to use the latest functionality. If you are interested in joining, you can sign up online to join the SAP Screen Personas practitioner forum. This will add you to the mailing list for the monthly meeting summaries. Please contact me directly if you want to join the monthly calls.

I hope you start using Adapt UI for Classic Apps or SAP Screen Personas to make your business users happier and more productive.

For the SAP UX Foundations team, Peter Spielvogel.
(Yes, this is a new name for our organization. Same mission, same goals. The new name reflects that we have product managers and UX experts working together with engineers to achieve our goal of delighting SAP customers with a better user experience in SAP S/4HANA.)

entry.title: Re: Migration Object: Product having unwanted fields which are not relevant to client
entry.content:
Hi @jmarquezmr 

this procedure does not work for the new object modeler via LTMOM_CU_01.

Any other solution to hide unwanted field for the template ?

Thanks!

EC

SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: SFTP using Rise with SAP( no PI )
entry.content:
aatan,

I use a combination of AL11 mount points, AWS S3 buckets (mounted on EACH application server), and an EXTERNAL scheduling tool (JAMS) to push/pull the files using SFTP.

ECS will mount the S3 bucket on each application server as part of a standard service request.

James

entry.title: How to set default Tax Codes for Customer Invoice, Credit Memo etc. in SAP Business ByDesign?
entry.content:
I'm looking for guidance on how to set default Tax Codes for Customer Invoice, Credit Memo and other documents in SAP Business ByDesign.

Specifically, I'm dealing with Sales Returns following the process: Delivery Notification → Inbound Delivery → Return → Credit Memo.

Currently, the Tax Code is automatically determined for Credit Memos, requiring manual correction in the Invoice Request's Item Tab → Tax Sub Tab.

If there is a configuration method in SAP Business ByDesign to define the default Tax Code, could you please provide step-by-step instructions?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: How to extend headers in fiori list object
entry.content: I am creating a CAP application with fiori UI using list object floorplan. I want to extend my header to add one more custom heading. is it possible ?

entry.title: SAC Master Data Loads - Exclude few records
entry.content:
Hello Gurus - I have a requirement to exclude a few records from file while loading into SAC Public Dimension (NOT into MODEL). I don't see any option while doing transformation (mapping). Is there a way to exclude them?

For Example:

Dimension Name: WBS_ELEM

We are importing data using file. File would have the details of WBS Elements where WBS Element ID starts with, lets say ABC and XYZ.

While loading data into this Public Dimension, I want to exclude all the records from the file which are starting with ABC.

Please advise.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi, this is Samin and I’m currently completing the final semester of my MBA in International Business at Trinity Western University, Vancouver. I’m writing to express not only my interest in the HANA Technical Support internship, but also my deep and personal passion for SAP and a sincere request to explore any path to be part of your ecosystem.

My journey has not been linear, but it has been rich with purpose. I started my career after graduating in Computer Software Engineering, working with databases, SQL, and networks. Life’s circumstances later led me into instructing, but everything changed when I joined a large oil and gas project team in Iran. That opportunity brought me close to real-world engineering, procurement, contracts, and planning. I found myself engaging with business processes deeply: contributing to BPMS design, entering and validating contract data, supporting EDMS/PPMS system implementations (ERP), and even training users by translating complex systems into understandable workflows.

Through it all, I realized something: I was passionate about making processes smarter and more human, and SAP spoke that exact language. Since moving to Canada, I’ve joined the SAP community online, attended webinars, and continued learning on my own. I’ve been waiting for the right opportunity to align my lived experience with the structured, global impact that SAP creates.

I understand that I may not meet all the technical criteria listed to start very quick, but I am a fast learner with proven adaptability, cross-functional collaboration experience, and a strong desire to grow within the SAP ecosystem. I believe that with the right guidance and opportunity, I can grow quickly into a valuable contributor to SAP.

Even if I’m not the typical candidate, I would be incredibly grateful for any chance, even a short conversation, to learn more, share more, and explore how I might start from somewhere, however small, within your dynamic environment.

Thank you for considering my story and the potential behind it.

entry.title: LS10 - Mass Create Storage Bin: No Aisle/Stack/Level generated
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

 

Hello,

While creating bins via LS10 transaction (S4 Public Cloud), the Aisle, Stack and Level information is not filled automatically in the simulated bins.  Here is the date I'm using:

 

But the aisle/stack/level is not filled by the system:

 

I don't understand where the issue comes from.  Can you help me on this?

Regards,

Jasmin

entry.title: mail forms attributes for focused build defect management
entry.content: i have created mail form for focused build defect notification, in the mail body i want to include defect id as attribute but i am unable to find the attribute for the defect id under additional attribute

entry.title: Re: Translation Solution
entry.content:
Hi Nick,

The only thing that I'm aware of that will translate documents like Word or PPT documents is the SAP Translation Hub.  You can access details here.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to enable sorrogate bidding option in Ariba Sourcing
entry.content:
Hello,

You would try to activate functions with this guide Administering Bids and Surrogate Bidding

entry.title: Re: How to get abnormal values of measuring point
entry.content: Would you please elaborate on your query. What kind of abnormal values you want to record? Can you write few examples?

entry.title: Time Valution for Bank Holiday on Saturday
entry.content:
Dear Community members 

I would need your advice in one customer's requirement:

Let me exaplain you the internal rule for weekend/public holiday work with one simple example:

Employee which is supposed to work during the Saturday, Sunday and Bank holiday records to his time sheet a single working time type "Overtime". All hours recorded as "Overtime" are subject of following rules:

1. "Overtime" recorded on SUNDAY or PUBLIC HOLIDAY should be compensated with base hourly wage of a rate "A".

2. "Overtime" recorded on SATURDAY should be compensated with base hourly wage of a rate "B".

3. "Overtime" recorded on SATURDAY  and this Saturday is in the same time PUBLIC HOLIDAY, should be compensated ONLY with base hourly wage of a rate "A".

Do you have idea how to cover cases in example No.3 with some time valuations that ensures that employee is not compensated with both rates but the rate valid for Public holiday is chosen by the valuation?

 

Many thanks, Jana

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central 

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking 

@Volker_Ruof

entry.title: Attach pdf documents to batch master
entry.content: I was looking to see if there is a way where I can attach pdf documents to a batch master

entry.title: Re: Purchasing organization for direct and indirect procurement processes.
entry.content:
I would recommend a couple of points for you to look at this

1) Does your business want to different organizations as you have mentioned

2) Also does business want transactions and spend differentiated by direct and indirect

3) More organizations leads to more data management, change management as well security activities. This is also something to consider

entry.title: Org Chart - Filter between employees and contractors
entry.content:
We need to be able to update the org chart to be able to exclude contractors to ensure the headcount numbers listed on the Org chart card only counts internal employees. 

Can this be achieved through adding a filter or created an addition org chart tab?

entry.title: Re: What’s New in DTV 1.6
entry.content:
Hi @abhyarthana 

Has the behaviour of the Extraction changed in 1.6 ? We were previously using version 1.4 where the main job kicked off for Extraction of all child work items. Now the observation is that the Work items go into "Waiting" status, even though enough work processes are available. This now requires us to actively monitor and hit "Refresh" to get the extraction going again.

entry.title: Re: CCV2 (SAP Commerce Cloud) mTLS (Mutual TLS, Two-Way T...
entry.content:
mTLS support was added to the Cloud Automation component of SAP Commerce Cloud in 2024.

  • Security Recommendations | SAP Help Portal
  • Creating an Endpoint | SAP Help Portal
  • Trusted CA Certificates for Client Authentication | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Defaulting Pick-Up Dates on Freight Units
entry.content: Hi Ajit, thanks for the references. I have done further testings and it seems that my issue is with the type of constraints I assigned. If I use '3', the dates are all calculated.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone 2H 2024 Release Highlights: Enhancing Employee Experiences
entry.content: Hi community, do you have any document where SAP descontinue the pre productive enviroment to WorkZone for HR? SKU 8008428. We have a customer thta don´t up the non productive enviroment.

entry.title: Lock to duplicate lines of the same product manually and by migration.
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,
Can you help me determine if it's possible to block duplicate lines of the same product in the sales order natively or through development?

 

 

In the same way, from the app we can have a block that prevents uploading duplicate lines.

We welcome your comments.

entry.title: BIRT template for Position Tile View
entry.content:
Hi,

In order to print position tiles to PDF we need to upload BIRT template in provisioning.

Does anyone know how we can get that template, does anyone have such a template and could share it ?

Thank you for any tips,

 

BR,

Lukasz

entry.title: LMS: Is it possible to create an item with an Ongoing completion status - not for credit?
entry.content:
We created a people manager toolkit in SCORM 1.2 format and want to set it up in the LMS for people managers to use for reference in their day-to-day. The goal is for it to remain in the learning assignments section over time, and to be able to open and reopen the content without receiving a course complete confirmation.

Item type = Resource.

Completion status created = Ongoing not-for-credit completion status.

However, when configuring the item, the completion status available only displays the for-credit status and does not allow me to select the one created for this. As a result, as soon as users complete the full content, they receive a course complete confirmation, not being able to reopen the content.

Is there a way around this?

Thanks!
